summary: Tested Daily Checklist (DAILY OPS) tab and all related features. All 10 test scenarios passed.

test_results.bottom_nav_renders: PASS - bottom-nav found with INTEL and DAILY OPS tabs
test_results.daily_ops_tab_switch: PASS - clicking DAILY OPS shows DailyChecklist screen
test_results.10_tasks_visible: PASS - all 10 tasks visible (wanted_monster, doom_walker, arms_race, tavern, trucks, stamina, likes, collect, alliance_helps, dig_site)
test_results.intel_tab_switch_back: PASS - clicking INTEL returns to WarRoom chat interface
test_results.task_toggle_strikethrough: PASS - clicking task shows strikethrough + CheckSquare cyan icon
test_results.progress_bar_updates: PASS - progress bar shows 9.09% (1/11) after checking 1 task
test_results.clear_all_resets: PASS - CLEAR ALL button resets all tasks
test_results.chat_input_not_obscured: PASS - chat input bbox bottom (240.5) is well above nav top (792)
test_results.active_tab_indicator: PASS - cyan underline indicator present on active DAILY OPS tab
test_results.weekly_tasks_section: PASS - TODAY'S OPERATIONS section visible (Monday = Drone Parts day)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Daily Checklist features working. App URL: https://war-ops-ai.preview.emergentagent.com. Setup: server=1042. From iteration_11: drone level not shown in sidebar (still unresolved from prior iteration).
